# rubrik_cluster_settings (List Resource)

The `rubrik_cluster_settings` list resource lists the upgrade and download
state of Rubrik clusters registered with RSC.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) Filter clusters by name (exact match).
- `version` (String) Filter clusters by installed CDM version (exact match).
